question: Which AWS service is a content delivery network for low-latency content delivery?

explanation:

Users get lower latency—the time it takes to load the first byte of the file—and higher data transfer rates. (https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudFront/latest/DeveloperGuide/Introduction.html)

correctAnswer: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue to ingest the alerts, and set the message retention period to 14 days.
